heading: Warrant officers: original appointment; service credit
label: 572 Warrant officers: original appointment; service credit
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 556 of this titlePub. L. 102–190, § 1112(a)
Amendments2022— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 117–263
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1991 Amendment note under .Feb. 1, 1992section 1132 of Pub. L. 102–190section 521 of this title
amendments: Amendments2022— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 117–263
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1991 Amendment note under .Feb. 1, 1992section 1132 of Pub. L. 102–190section 521 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: For the purposes of promotion, persons originally appointed in regular or reserve warrant officer grades shall be credited with such service as the Secretary concerned may prescribe. However, such a person may not be credited with a period of service greater than the period of active service performed in the grade, or pay grade corresponding to the grade, in which so appointed, or in any higher grade or pay grade.

For special training or experience in a particular warrant officer field designated by the Secretary concerned, if such training or experience is directly related to the operational needs of the armed force concerned, as determined by such Secretary concerned.

For advanced education in a warrant officer field designated by the Secretary concerned, if such education is directly related to the operational needs of the armed force concerned, as determined by such Secretary concerned.
